@t<home-description: A personal website for Dr. Zaid Rayan, focused on endodontics, root canal treatment, and calm modern dental care.
@t<home-description>: A personal website for Dr. Zaid Rayan, focused on endodontics, root canal treatment, and calm modern dental care.

@t<home_meta.description>: Discover Dr. Zaid Rayan's personal website, focused on endodontics, root canal treatment, and patient-first dental care.

contact.description>: Use the contact form to ask a question or request an appointment. Your message will be sent directly and saved securely for follow-up.

form.error>: Something went wrong while sending your message. Please try again.

message.placeholder>: Tell us what you need, your symptoms, or the type of appointment you want to book

form.success>: Your message has been sent successfully. We can now follow up with you.

contact.helper_text>: For root canal treatment, endodontic consultation, or any other dental service, send your details here and the clinic can follow up with you.
contact.title>: Send a message and request your appointment.

doctor.description>: He studied dentistry in Damascus, Syria, and graduated in 2025. His main specialization is endodontics, with root canal treatment as the area he is especially known for.
doctor.point_1>: Studied dentistry in Damascus, Syria and graduated in 2025.
doctor.point_2>: Specialized in endodontics, with a strong focus on root canal treatment.
doctor.point_3>: Offers other dental services as well, through a calm and clearly explained patient experience.
doctor.title>: Dr. Zaid Rayan is an endodontist focused on careful, modern root canal care.

footer.note>: Simple, calm, and focused on healthy smiles.

hero.description>: Thoughtful dental care for routine checkups, smile improvements, and treatment plans that feel clear from the first conversation, with a special focus on endodontics and root canal treatment.

highlight_1.description>: Special attention to diagnosing and treating tooth pain, nerve infections, and root canal cases with precision.

highlight_2.description>: Each case is explained simply so patients understand the problem, the plan, and what to expect next.

highlight_3.description>: Other dental services are available too, while endodontics and RCT remain the main area of specialization.

hero.title>: Healthy smiles start with calm, precise care.

services.description>: Root canal treatment is the core specialty, supported by other dental services that help patients receive complete care when needed.

item_1.description>: Focused endodontic care for inflamed or infected tooth nerves, handled with precision and a calm clinical approach.

item_2.description>: Careful assessment of tooth pain, pulp condition, and treatment needs before moving into the right procedure.

item_3.description>: Clear follow-up support after treatment, with guidance on the next restorative steps when needed.

item_4.description>: Other general dental services are also available, while root canal treatment remains the main specialty.

services.title>: Specialized endodontic care, centered on root canal treatment.

visit.description>: The clinic experience is kept simple so patients can move from consultation to treatment with confidence.

step_1.description>: Start with a calm conversation about your needs, concerns, and treatment goals.

step_2.description>: Receive a clear explanation of the tooth condition and whether root canal treatment or another service is the right next step.

step_3.description>: Move forward with care that prioritizes comfort, precision, and confident follow-up.

visit.title>: A smooth experience from first conversation to follow-up.

@t<not-found-page-description>: The page you're looking for no longer exists. Perhaps it got removed, or it's never been there.
